description: A ramp agent must oversee the fueling of an aircraft to ensure the correct amount of fuel is loaded.

nodes.task_description: Receive the final fuel figure from the flight plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent knows the exact amount of fuel to be loaded.

nodes.task_description: Communicate the required fuel amount to the fueling company.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the fueler with the correct order.

nodes.task_description: Supervise the fueling process and verify that the final amount of fuel loaded matches the order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the correct amount of fuel is on board.
